title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty, keto-friendly Irish beef stew made with tender beef, flavorful stock, and a hint of bitter notes from the stew.
instructions: Heat the stock in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Irish stew and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the shattering (if using) and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a green salad.
